The '''oorg''' was a small animal native to [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]]. It was domesticated by the [[Cerean/Legends|Cereans]]. It was small, pink, and had a long snout.<ref name="SW985">{{StoryCite|series=Star Wars (1998)|srtext=''Star Wars'' (1998)|issue1=4|issue2=6|story=Vow of Justice}}</ref>

{{Creature-stub}}
